name: Deshi Shahi Cow
description: A healthy and strong deshi cow, well-fed with natural grass and hay. Perfect for Qurbani with excellent health record and calm temperament. Vaccinated and certified by local vet.

name: Brahma Premium Bull
description: A magnificent Brahman bull with impressive size and healthy build. Raised with the best nutrition and proper veterinary care. One of the finest animals available this season.

name: Sindhi Red Cow
description: Beautiful Sindhi breed cow, known for heat tolerance and strong immune system. Vaccinated and certified healthy. Great choice for Qurbani at an excellent price.

name: Hariana Champion Bull
description: A premium Hariana bull renowned for its large frame and excellent meat quality. Fed on organic feed and raised in a clean, hygienic environment. A true champion for Qurbani.

name: Black Bengal Goat
description: The famous Black Bengal goat, a native breed of Bangladesh known for its high-quality meat. Compact, healthy, and well-suited for Qurbani. A beloved choice for families.

name: Jamunapari Premium Goat
description: A large and healthy Jamunapari goat, one of the most prized breeds for Qurbani. Known for its impressive size and tender meat quality. Raised with natural feed.

name: Sirohi Mountain Goat
description: A robust Sirohi goat with excellent adaptability and disease resistance. Fed on fresh green grass and grains. Ideal Qurbani animal with full health certification from licensed vet.

name: Frisian Mix Bull
description: A magnificent Frisian crossbreed bull with large frame and premium meat. This well-fed animal has been raised with special Qurbani preparation in mind. Delivered to Dhaka area.
